changelog: FIX (right-edge vertical line glitch on dark scenes) — Replaced PlayerView's default SurfaceView surface with a TextureView surface across both TV and Mobile players. This eliminates the 1-2 px bright vertical line on the right edge of dark frames (HW overlay chroma upsampling overshoot, ExoPlayer #8394). New res/layout/player_view_texture.xml inflated by both AndroidView wrappers.

FIX (record without EPG would silently capture for 1 h) — Long-press OK Record action and the in-player REC chip now both refuse recording on channels with no EPG, with a clear toast: "Can't record \"X\" — this channel has no program guide. Recording is disabled until EPG is available." Applied on TV and Mobile.
DVR quota lowered from 20 h to 5 h per user. Server: DEFAULT_QUOTA_S 72_000 → 18_000, systemd unit Environment override matched. Skip-reason / quota-exceeded toast text updated.

Telemetry — PlaybackTelemetry now also flushes a report when video starts but no audio format / decoder ever initializes (e.g. movie like Blue Ruin reportedly has no audio). Lets us see exactly which audio format the file carries and whether the decoder rejected it, no guessing.
Mandatory:true so v1.44.35 devices upgrade automatically.
